---
title: "Projects"
---

### Enterprise Knowledge Agent Platform
RAG + Agent architecture using LlamaIndex, LangChain, FastAPI, and MCP.
[→ GitHub](https://github.com/ChengYuChuan/knowledge-agent)

---

### SHAP Imputer API
Multi-framework SHAP value computation supporting PyTorch, JAX, NumPy, pandas, polars.
[→ GitHub](https://github.com/ChengYuChuan/shap-imputer)

---

*More on [GitHub →](https://github.com/ChengYuChuan)*
